rankings.reason: Best narrative flow; it effectively captures the futuristic, stress-free, and high-tech experience requested by the persona.
Strong technical vision, but lacks the requested narrative story format and cohesive marketing slogans.
Includes a story and slogans, but the experience feels more like a modern mall than a futuristic 2050 airport.
Fails to provide the requested creative story, instead offering a generic list of features and influencer-style filler text.
